expectations.evidence: Uses hardcoded COLORS object with hex values (#0A0A0A, #00FF9D, #FF3B3B) instead of CSS custom properties or Tailwind tokens
Container uses bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.04)] with no backdrop-blur, no saturate
font-mono on all cells and labels
rounded-lg on container, rounded-sm on badges
Row hover changes background to surfaceHover, 150ms transition
No // prefix on column headers, uses plain uppercase labels
tabular-nums on PnL and price cells
Uses #00FF9D green and #FF3B3B red for profit/loss
animate-ping for open/pending, static for closed, includes pending state
Uses animate-pulse instead of skeleton-shimmer gradient animation
